name: EdwLoadEcomMbrRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (select SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) as RUN_CYC_NO from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC where TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' and SUBJ_CD='MBR ECOM' and EDW_LOAD_IN='N' and RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} group by SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE p SET p.EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC p INNER JOIN cte ON p.SRC_SYS_CD=cte.SRC_SYS_CD and p.TRGT_SYS_CD=cte.TRGT_SYS_CD and p.SUBJ_CD=cte.SUBJ_CD and p.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE p.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Description:
JOB NAME:     EdwLoadEcomMbrRunCycUpd

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.

MODIFICATIONS:

Developer               Date                         Change Description                                                                           Project #          Development Project          Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed  
------------------             ----------------------------     -----------------------------------------------------------------------                                   ----------------         ------------------------------------       ----------------------------      ----------------
Bhoomi                     02/19/2009             Originally Programmed                                                                      3863                    devlEDWcur                   Steph Goddard           02/24/2009

Pooja Sunkara         08/01/2013             Converted from Server to Parallel                                                      5114                   EnterpriseWrhsDevl

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
EDW Ecommerce Membership Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Ecomerce Membership with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
